title: helichrysum brunioides
intro: Helichrysum brunioides, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and silvery-gray leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Helichrysum brunioides include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the specific application and intended health benefit.
